tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall addrgrp
edit "Approved_Egress_Destinations"
set member "all"
next
end
config firewall service custom
edit "HTTP_HTTPS_ICMP"
set tcp-portrange 80 443
set protocol ICMP
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Approved_Egress"
set srcintf "Gi0/2"
set dstintf "Gi0/1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP_HTTPS_ICMP"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
edit 0
set name "Deny_Unauthorized_Ubuntu_Egress"
set srcintf "Gi0/2"
set dstintf "Gi0/1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end
show firewall policy"}

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"

        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP_HTTPS_ICMP"
        set logtraffic all
set nat enable
    next
    edit 3
        set name "Deny_Unauthorized_Ubuntu_Egress"
        set uuid 090aa51a-295c-51f1-b650-3ed4b8b5f05b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"

        set logtraffic all
    next
end
